pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: CloudFront's global edge network provides high availability. Origin failover configured for backend resilience.

pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: HTTPS enforced with ACM certificates. WAF integration for application-layer protection. Origin access identity restricts direct S3 access.

pillars.title: Performance
pillars.description: Edge caching reduces latency for global users. Compression enabled for faster delivery. Custom cache policies per content type.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Caching reduces origin requests and data transfer. Price class selection limits edge locations to needed regions.
